overview.short: Avaneeswaram is a small village located on Kunnicode-Pathanapuram road in Kollam district, Kerala.
overview.description: Avaneeswaram is a small village located on Kunnicode-Pathanapuram road in Kollam district, Kerala. It is about 7 kilometers south of Pathanapuram town and 36 kilometers from Kollam. It is a part of Vilakkudy panchayat. Avaneeswaram has a FCI (Food corporation of India) storage facility.

topPlaces.description: Kamukumchery is a village located in Pathanapuram in Kollam district of Kerala, India. The village belongs to the Piravanthoor and Thalavor panchayats.

topPlaces.description: Thalavoor is a village located in the district of Kollam in the Kerala state of India. It is 77 km to the north of the State Capital, Thiruvananthapuram, and 28 km to the east of District Capital, Kollam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Avaneeswaram?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Avaneeswaram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Avaneeswaram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Avaneeswaram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Avaneeswaram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Avaneeswaram?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Avaneeswaram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Orthodox Church, Avaneeswaram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vilakkudy, Kamukumchery, Thalavoor, Pidavoor, Parankimamukal.
